skills.name: Identify
skills.description: Set up a shop to identify unidentified items. The higher the skill level, the higher the chances of applying additional stats to the item.
skills.effect_text: Increased chances of additional item stats

skills.name: Devaluation
skills.description: Apply Devaluation debuff to 1 enemy in front to decrease

skills.name: Triplet Lense
skills.description: Possess 5 Triplet Lense that automatically damages the nearby enemy temporarily. 1 Triplet Lense is consumed when attacking the enemy, all remaining Lense is consumed when attacking the boss target, and duration is applied proportionally to the number of Lense consumed.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Duration of Lense applied to the enemy:
- Normal: 5 seconds
- Boss : [Number of Lense applied ] x 2 seconds

attributes.name: Expose Weakness: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Expose Weakness]'s minimum critical chance by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Expose Weakness: Dispersion
attributes.description:
* Number of targets nearby the target changed to 8

* Minimum Critical Rate on [Expose Weakness] target is halved

attributes.name: Huge Magnifier: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Huge Magnifier] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Huge Magnifier: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Huge Magnifier] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: High Scale Magnifying Glass: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [High Scale Magnifying Glass]'s Accuracy, Block Penetration increasing value by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Triplet Lense: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Triplet Lense] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Triplet Lense: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Triplet Lense] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] High Scale Magnifying Glass: Focus Trim
attributes.description:
* Original effect is removed and party members receive Final Damage increase by 3 + [skill level]* 1% buff for 30 seconds(Enhance Attribute applied)

*The final efficiency of the buff is reduced when the basic Physical ATK of the caster is lower than the basic ATK of the target
